mapper.select: SELECT entrust_id entrustId, entrust_number entrustNumber, entrust_type entrustType, entrust_company_id entrustCompanyId, witness_company_name witnessCompanyName, project_id projectId, project_part projectPart, sample_receive_way sampleReceiveWay, check_purpose checkPurpose, report_num reportNum, report_get_way reportGetWay, entrust_note entrustNote, entrust_data entrustData FROM jt_entrust_info WHERE entrust_id = #{entrustId}
